actionUnits.condition: Simulate player's collider (player ref fileID 7425022) entering the BoxCollider trigger of platform2 (2) (BoxCollider id 606197088, isTrigger=1). This should invoke AttachToElevator.OnTriggerEnter on MonoBehaviour id 606197086 (script guid 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77). Due to the condition `if (gameObject == player)`, no parenting will occur.

Simulate player's collider (player ref fileID 7425022) exiting the BoxCollider trigger of platform2 (2) (BoxCollider id 606197088, isTrigger=1). This should invoke AttachToElevator.OnTriggerExit on MonoBehaviour id 606197086 (script guid 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77). Due to the condition `if (gameObject == player)`, no unparenting will occur.
